_comment: Public denylist for scripts/check-no-institutional-leak.mjs. Keep this file generic and public-safe. Do not commit real institution, person, contact, source-path, email, domain, attachment-name, or hash-derived local identifiers here. Put exact local checks only in the gitignored scripts/leak-guard-denylist.local.json or a path supplied by STROKE_LEAK_GUARD_PRIVATE_DENYLIST.
_severityModel: institutionalTokens are banned on served/source clinical surfaces but allowed in meta/policy files. identityTokens, phiPatterns, and literal denylist entries are banned in every tracked file. Committed literal denylist entries must be synthetic sentinels only.
_allowedInstitutionalDisclaimerPatterns: Empty as of 2026-07: even negative institution-specific disclaimers are banned. Public safety copy must stay institution-neutral.
_institutionalScanExcludeDirs: Institutional tokens are governance-discussable in these dirs. docs/ is not excluded because GitHub Pages can serve the repo root. PHI patterns, literal denylist, and identity rules are still scanned.
